debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
μ : Measure Ω
ι : Type u_6
inst✝⁵ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderBot ι
inst✝³ : Countable ι
inst✝² : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝¹ : OrderTopology ι
X : ι → Ω → ℝ
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
inst✝ : SigmaFiniteFiltration μ 𝓕
hX : Submartingale X 𝓕 μ
τ : ℕ → Ω → WithTop ι
hτ : ∀ (i : ℕ), IsStoppingTime 𝓕 (τ i)
n : ι
hτ_le : ∀ (i : ℕ) (ω : Ω), τ i ω ≤ ↑n
⊢ UniformIntegrable (fun i => stoppedValue X (τ i)) 1 μ

failed_attempts:
let D := hX.doobDecomposition
  have h_eq : X = D.martingale + D.process := D.eq.symm
  rw [h_eq]
  refine UniformIntegrable.add one_le_one (D.martingale_prop.uniformIntegrable_stoppedValue τ hτ hτ_le) ?_
  have hA_int : Integrable (D.process n) μ := by
    rw [← D.eq, Pi.add_apply]
    exact (hX.integrable n).sub (D.martingale_prop.integrable n)
  refine uniformIntegrable_of_dominated_singleton one_le_one one_ne_top
      (memLp_one_iff_integrable.2 hA_int)
      (fun i ↦ (D.adapted.stronglyMeasurable_stoppedValue (hτ i)).aestronglyMeasurable) ?_
  intro i
  filter_upwards [D.monotonic (hτ i) (isStoppingTime_const _ n) (hτ_le i)] with ω h
  rw [Pi.add_apply] at h
  rw [stoppedValue, Real.norm_of_nonneg (D.monotonic.nonneg D.zero _ _)]
  exact h
